description: Bias the next Herbalisti frontier slices toward broader botany, materia medica, hygiene, nursing, dietetics, and household-health coverage while avoiding the most saturated family-physician repeats and weaker Wellcome outliers.
notes: This profile captures the curated exclusion list used after the registry-first Wellcome improvement.
It is intended for broadening slices, not maximum-throughput top-score batches.
The exclusion set also trims one more polemical Wellcome witness that surfaced during the first profile dry run.
